title: Combat&PvP tweaks
description: Small tweaks for textures suited for PvP
body:
This is a resourcepack aimed to improve the PvP experience. As of version 1.0, it has the following features:
- Dagger sword textures (same as https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-daggers)
- Black arrow tips (like the flint tipped arrows on Vanilla Tweaks)
- RGB bow pulling (red at lowest state, yellow in the middle, green when fully pulled)
- RGB mining bar instead of the vanilla cracks (goes from red to yellow to green)
- Shorter grass and fire for better visibility
- More transparent water for better visibility
- Cool totem with sunglasses
